/usr/bin/ar qc libmvgal_core.a CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/api/mvgal_api.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/api/mvgal_log.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/daemon/gpu_manager.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/daemon/config.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/daemon/ipc.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/execution/execution.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/memory/memory.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/memory/dmabuf.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/memory/allocator.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/memory/sync.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/scheduler.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/load_balancer.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/workload_splitter.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/strategy/afr.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/strategy/sfr.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/strategy/task.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/strategy/compute_offload.o CMakeFiles/mvgal_core.dir/scheduler/strategy/hybrid.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmvgal_core.a
